analysis: The project is a black hole-themed website with a focus on animations and interactive elements. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the website. The CSS file is incomplete and needs to be updated to fully implement the dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file needs to be completed with all sections, including a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon. The JavaScript file needs to be fixed for syntax errors and completed to ensure all functions are properly implemented.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
